title: alibertia latifolia
intro: Alibertia latifolia, also known as the "Brazilian guanina", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine in Brazil for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alibertia latifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. Alibertia latifolia is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
